meta.title: The Great Debate: Anti Virus and Monthly Security Patching Should Be Abandoned In ICS
meta.description:
As much as I like how S4 has grown to 3-days, 3 stages, 300+ people, this S4x12 Great Debate with 45 people arguing in a case study room / theater in the round was fantastic. Billy Rios, Ralph Langner, Andrew Ginter, Brad Hegrat, Eric Byres, Eireann Leverett, Zach Tudor, ... amazing room of talent arguing with each other.

I (Dale) feel quite good 5 years later about my anti-virus being abandoned stance, although my timeframe was optimistic.


Sorry for the last 10 minutes when it was audio only.
